durableFields.boundary: runtime active-effect lifecycle admitted by SpellAttack or SaveGatedSpell host outcomes, projected through ConditionLifecycle and ActiveEffect route owners, expired or opened by turn-boundary routing, transitioned by repeat-save failure, and cleaned up by condition-lifecycle or active-effect routing
runtime combatant fact used at condition-rider admission to reject a copied QNT condition-immunity row without authored spell or target identity dispatch

nonDurableBoundaryApiSurface.boundary: public reducer constructor for targeted ConditionRiderRouteSubject values
public reducer discovery observer for condition-rider repeat-save and escape frontiers
public reducer discovery observer for save-gated condition-rider host setup
route evidence vocabulary projected from public reducer trace events
dirty target replay evidence only; records SQNT-03D connector row acceptance, not fresh target acceptance

noRedundantStateFinding: No driver-local durable condition state was added. The existing BattleSpellActiveEffects aggregate now owns one typed condition_rider lifecycle value, and combatant condition immunities are owned on Combatant because immunity rejection is a target fact used at admission.
